panels.title: Income — close
panels.description: EUR. Ordinary income in the latest immutable closed budget month; requires the current finance trust gate to pass.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(month) month FROM budget_snapshots) SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN SUM(i.amount_cents)/100.0 END AS value,MAX(l.month) AS latest_month FROM ordinary_income i JOIN latest l ON l.month=i.month CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Spend — close
panels.description: EUR. Absolute canonical consumption in the latest immutable closed budget month; requires the current finance trust gate to pass.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(month) month FROM budget_snapshots) SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN ABS(SUM(c.amount_cents))/100.0 END AS value,MAX(l.month) AS latest_month FROM consumption c JOIN latest l ON l.month=c.month CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Savings rate
panels.description: Percent. Canonical contributions divided by ordinary income in the latest immutable closed budget month; null for zero income or failed trust.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(month) month FROM budget_snapshots), monthly AS (SELECT l.month latest_month,(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents),0) FROM ordinary_income i WHERE i.month=l.month) income_cents,(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents),0) FROM savings_contributions s WHERE s.month=l.month) saved_cents FROM latest l) SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 AND m.income_cents>0 THEN 100.0*m.saved_cents/m.income_cents END AS value,m.latest_month FROM monthly m CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Contributions
panels.description: EUR. Transfers from on-budget accounts into off-budget savings/investment accounts in the latest immutable closed budget month.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(month) month FROM budget_snapshots) SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN SUM(s.amount_cents)/100.0 END AS value,MAX(l.month) AS latest_month FROM savings_contributions s JOIN latest l ON l.month=s.month CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Monthly income, consumption, and contributions
panels.description: EUR/month, trailing 24 months; each target returns data_as_of. Canonical ordinary income, absolute consumption, and contributions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s',month||'-01') AS INTEGER) AS time,SUM(amount_cents)/100.0 AS "Ordinary income",MAX(MAX(date)) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM ordinary_income WHERE date>=date('now','-24 months','start of month') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

SELECT CAST(strftime('%s',month||'-01') AS INTEGER) AS time,ABS(SUM(amount_cents))/100.0 AS Consumption,MAX(MAX(date)) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM consumption WHERE date>=date('now','-24 months','start of month') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

SELECT CAST(strftime('%s',month||'-01') AS INTEGER) AS time,SUM(amount_cents)/100.0 AS Contributions,MAX(MAX(date)) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM savings_contributions WHERE date>=date('now','-24 months','start of month') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

panels.title: Consumption mix by canonical role
panels.description: EUR/month by role, trailing 12 months; data_as_of is returned. Role labels and distinct blue/gold shades remain legible without color.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT month,ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN category_role='fixed' THEN amount_cents ELSE 0 END))/100.0 AS Fixed,ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN category_role='essential' THEN amount_cents ELSE 0 END))/100.0 AS Essential,ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN category_role='discretionary' THEN amount_cents ELSE 0 END))/100.0 AS Discretionary,ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN category_role='sinking_fund' THEN amount_cents ELSE 0 END))/100.0 AS "Sinking funds",MAX(MAX(date)) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM consumption WHERE date>=date('now','-12 months','start of month') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

panels.title: Month-over-month category drivers
panels.description: EUR. Latest two observed immutable closes, including appeared and disappeared categories, ranked by absolute delta. latest_month and prior_month are shown.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH closed_months AS (SELECT DISTINCT month FROM budget_snapshots ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 2),latest AS (SELECT MAX(month) month FROM closed_months),prev AS (SELECT MIN(month) month FROM closed_months),cur AS (SELECT COALESCE(category_name,'(missing)') label,ABS(SUM(amount_cents)) cents FROM consumption WHERE month=(SELECT month FROM latest) GROUP BY COALESCE(category_name,'(missing)')),prior_values AS (SELECT COALESCE(category_name,'(missing)') label,ABS(SUM(amount_cents)) cents FROM consumption WHERE month=(SELECT month FROM prev) GROUP BY COALESCE(category_name,'(missing)')),driver_keys AS (SELECT label FROM cur UNION SELECT label FROM prior_values) SELECT k.label AS Category,ROUND(COALESCE(cur.cents,0)/100.0,2) AS "Latest EUR",ROUND(COALESCE(prior_values.cents,0)/100.0,2) AS "Prior EUR",ROUND((COALESCE(cur.cents,0)-COALESCE(prior_values.cents,0))/100.0,2) AS "Change EUR",latest.month AS latest_month,prev.month AS prior_month FROM driver_keys k LEFT JOIN cur ON cur.label=k.label LEFT JOIN prior_values ON prior_values.label=k.label CROSS JOIN latest CROSS JOIN prev ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(cur.cents,0)-COALESCE(prior_values.cents,0)) DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Month-over-month merchant drivers
panels.description: EUR. Latest two observed immutable closes, including appeared and disappeared merchants, ranked by absolute delta. latest_month and prior_month are shown.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH closed_months AS (SELECT DISTINCT month FROM budget_snapshots ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 2),latest AS (SELECT MAX(month) month FROM closed_months),prev AS (SELECT MIN(month) month FROM closed_months),cur AS (SELECT COALESCE(payee_name,'(missing)') label,ABS(SUM(amount_cents)) cents FROM consumption WHERE month=(SELECT month FROM latest) GROUP BY COALESCE(payee_name,'(missing)')),prior_values AS (SELECT COALESCE(payee_name,'(missing)') label,ABS(SUM(amount_cents)) cents FROM consumption WHERE month=(SELECT month FROM prev) GROUP BY COALESCE(payee_name,'(missing)')),driver_keys AS (SELECT label FROM cur UNION SELECT label FROM prior_values) SELECT k.label AS Merchant,ROUND(COALESCE(cur.cents,0)/100.0,2) AS "Latest EUR",ROUND(COALESCE(prior_values.cents,0)/100.0,2) AS "Prior EUR",ROUND((COALESCE(cur.cents,0)-COALESCE(prior_values.cents,0))/100.0,2) AS "Change EUR",latest.month AS latest_month,prev.month AS prior_month FROM driver_keys k LEFT JOIN cur ON cur.label=k.label LEFT JOIN prior_values ON prior_values.label=k.label CROSS JOIN latest CROSS JOIN prev ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(cur.cents,0)-COALESCE(prior_values.cents,0)) DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Consumption and three-month rolling average
panels.description: EUR/month, trailing 24 months; data_as_of is returned. Canonical consumption compared with a trailing three-observation average.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH monthly AS (SELECT month,ABS(SUM(amount_cents))/100.0 value FROM consumption WHERE date>=date('now','-24 months','start of month') GROUP BY month) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s',month||'-01') AS INTEGER) time,value AS "Consumption EUR",AVG(value) OVER (ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "3-month average EUR",MAX(month) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM monthly ORDER BY month

panels.title: Annualized irregular-cost funding
panels.description: EUR/year. Latest immutable captured_at budget for sinking-fund categories multiplied by 12; planned funding, not realized-spend forecast.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest_capture AS (SELECT MAX(captured_at) captured_at FROM budget_snapshots) SELECT b.category_name AS Category,12.0*b.budgeted_cents/100.0 AS "Annualized EUR",b.captured_at FROM budget_snapshots b JOIN latest_capture l ON l.captured_at=b.captured_at WHERE b.category_role='sinking_fund' ORDER BY b.budgeted_cents DESC

panels.title: Recent unusual consumption
panels.description: Last 30 days with data_as_of shown. Consumption at least twice a merchant's 180-day average, using merchants with at least three observations; EUR.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH payee_baseline AS (SELECT payee_name,AVG(ABS(amount_cents)) avg_cents,COUNT(*) observations FROM consumption WHERE date>=date('now','-180 days') AND payee_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payee_name HAVING COUNT(*)>=3) SELECT c.date AS Date,c.payee_name AS Merchant,c.category_name AS Category,ROUND(ABS(c.amount_cents)/100.0,2) AS "Amount EUR",ROUND(p.avg_cents/100.0,2) AS "180-day average EUR",ROUND(ABS(c.amount_cents)/p.avg_cents,1) AS Multiple,p.observations AS "Baseline observations",MAX(c.date) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM consumption c JOIN payee_baseline p ON p.payee_name=c.payee_name WHERE c.date>=date('now','-30 days') AND ABS(c.amount_cents)>=2*p.avg_cents ORDER BY ABS(c.amount_cents)/p.avg_cents DESC LIMIT 20
